mapper.sql: id, email, password, role, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time, last_login_time, token_version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET token_version = token_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
